objective: Replace a single p98-conditional comparison anchor with a low-freedom clean baseline family.

score_source.construction_rule: Rank names by 1-day reversal using D0-visible adjusted close history only.
score_source.source_chain_auditability: Deterministic formula with fixed direction and no discretionary source-selection branch.

fail_fast_conditions: p98 appears anywhere in the source chain
label diagnostics appear anywhere in the source chain
frozen test access is requested or observed
D0 visible only is violated
score direction is not explicitly c1 ASC
baselines.intended_role: clean comparison anchor candidate for the pure reversal leg
baselines.why_it_is_clean: It uses only D0-visible price history and eligibility, excludes p98, excludes label diagnostics, excludes trainval source-selection feedback, and remains directly auditable.

score_source.construction_rule: Rank names by trailing 20-day cumulative return using D0-visible adjusted close history only.
score_source.source_chain_auditability: Single fixed lookback and single fixed direction with no trainval-driven source swap.

baselines.score_direction: descending 20d cumulative return / stronger momentum first
fail_fast_conditions: p98 appears anywhere in the source chain
label diagnostics appear anywhere in the source chain
frozen test access is requested or observed
D0 visible only is violated
lookback or direction is changed from fixed 20d DESC momentum
baselines.intended_role: clean comparison anchor candidate for the pure momentum leg
baselines.why_it_is_clean: It is a fixed-formula historical-price baseline with no labels, no p98, no validation tuning, and an auditable source chain.

score_source.definition: 1d reversal primary, 20d median amount DESC tiebreak
score_source.construction_rule: Sort by 1-day reversal first; break ties with trailing 20-day median amount computed from D0-visible warehouse amount history. Warehouse vol and amount are both required visible source fields, while amount is the liquidity proxy used in ranking.
score_source.source_chain_auditability: Primary rule and tiebreak rule are fixed and can be reconstructed exactly from visible inputs, with audit recording vol and amount field bindings.

allowed_inputs: vol history required as warehouse volume source
amount history required for 20-day median amount liquidity proxy
baselines.score_direction: ascending 1d return first, descending liquidity tiebreak
fail_fast_conditions: p98 appears anywhere in the source chain
label diagnostics appear anywhere in the source chain
frozen test access is requested or observed
D0 visible only is violated
liquidity adjustment is changed from fixed 20d median amount tiebreak
warehouse vol field is missing
warehouse amount field is missing
baselines.intended_role: clean comparison anchor candidate for a liquidity-aware reversal leg
baselines.why_it_is_clean: It adds one fixed non-label tiebreak to the reversal rule, stays within D0-visible inputs, uses warehouse amount as the explicit liquidity proxy, avoids p98, and avoids trainval source-selection feedback.

score_source.construction_rule: Assign a deterministic pseudo-random score from a stable hash over snapshot_id, instrument_id, and baseline_id; rank ascending by hash.
score_source.source_chain_auditability: The hash seed is fixed, the ordering is reproducible, and there is no label- or validation-dependent branch.

baselines.score_direction: ascending deterministic hash / pseudo-random but reproducible order
fail_fast_conditions: p98 appears anywhere in the source chain
label diagnostics appear anywhere in the source chain
frozen test access is requested or observed
D0 visible only is violated
hash seed or sort rule is not fixed and reproducible
baselines.intended_role: clean comparison anchor candidate serving as a neutral control
baselines.why_it_is_clean: It depends only on D0-visible eligibility and fixed identifiers, uses no p98, uses no label diagnostics, uses no trainval source-selection feedback, and is maximally reproducible.
